_note: A representative page response the harness traverses. The bundled correct/naive stubs serve rows of exactly this shape from a 12-row demo dataset ordered by (created_at, id). Bodies are docs-derived illustrative shapes with clearly-fake demo markers (pgtk_demo_*) — never a real record or wire capture. The harness reads item ids from `items[].id` and the next page from `next_cursor`.
